steps: Contact BNP Paribas Securities to report overpayment of EUR 3,744.00 on TotalEnergies SE dividend due to under-withholding (13.5% vs treaty rate 15.0%)
Request custodian remit excess amount to French tax authorities or coordinate with client for direct payment to avoid treaty compliance issues
Document the correction with French tax authorities using Form 5001 if direct client payment is required
Ensure proper treaty rate application (15.0%) for future TotalEnergies SE dividends under FR-NO tax treaty

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
